block.drivebywire.backup_block.tooltip.s: Saves same-sublevel cable links into schematics and restores them when the sublevel comes back
block.drivebywire.controller_hub.tooltip: Bind your controller to this block, and control this network from far away!
block.drivebywire.tweaked_controller_hub: Bind your controller to this block, and control this network from far away!
drivebywire.configuration.shouldConsumeW: Whether or not wires should be consumed upon use when in survival mode.
drivebywire.ponder.lectern.text_1: Connections from lectern controllers have a special feature,
drivebywire.ponder.lectern.text_2: they have multiple channels to transmit over, corresponding to the controller keys.
drivebywire.ponder.lectern.text_3: Select the channel you want using the scrollwheel when holding Cables.
drivebywire.ponder.link.text_1: Cross-sublevel schematic relinking is not supported yet.
drivebywire.ponder.link.text_2: Backup Blocks currently preserve only internal same-sublevel cable links.
drivebywire.ponder.link.text_3: Connections that cross into the world or another sublevel are skipped for now.
drivebywire.ponder.link.text_4: Those links can come back later when the blueprint API grows the mapping hooks we need.
drivebywire.ponder.save.text_1: What if you wanted to save your network to schematic, and reload it?
drivebywire.ponder.save.text_2: Place a Backup Block on your sublevel before you schematic it,
drivebywire.ponder.save.text_3: And internal same-sublevel connections will be restored when the placed schematic is assembled.
drivebywire.ponder.tag.signal_sources.de: Components which emit signals on multiple channels
drivebywire.ponder.wires.text_1: Disclaimer: Cable networks only work on assembled VS2 ships!
drivebywire.ponder.wires.text_2: Connect a redstone source to a block,
drivebywire.ponder.wires.text_3: And the redstone power is transmitted over cable
drivebywire.ponder.wires.text_4: Connect a block to a block,
drivebywire.ponder.wires.text_5: And adjacent redstone power is transmitted over cable
item.drivebywire.wire_cutter.tooltip.sum: Bad connection? Too many cables? Just cut them all!
